_comment: Engaged-soldier highlight demo (Settings.show_engaged_highlight, the same dev/debug visual PR #758/#760 used for the SQUARE-branch sibling fixes) for #779's NORMAL-formation fix: a fresh scenario authored for THIS demo, not a copy of engaged-highlight-live-proximity.json or schiltron-asymmetric-pressure.json's setups -- see .claude/memories/sparta-demos.md's 'author each demo scenario fresh' entry. Two matched 40-soldier Infantry line regiments meet head-on and grind through prolonged melee; as casualties compact each side's per-soldier arrays (SoldierMelee.reap()), the amber highlight should keep tracking the LIVE front-facing soldiers (UnitFormation.live_front_indices) rather than drifting toward whatever indices happen to remain low in the compacted array -- the exact staleness #779 fixes. Team 0 is stationary by default, so an early attack-move order (right-click on the enemy block) is required to bring the two lines together. Requests the highlight via the session-only 'show_engaged_highlight' script field (Settings.set_show_engaged_highlight_session, never persisted). Timing verified locally via dump-state.sh: casualties (soldier count dropping on both sides) begin within the clip's frame budget and continue through the end.
